metrics.name: days_since_registration
metrics.description: Number of days since the user registered, defaulting to 0 if registration date is NULL.

metrics.name: completion_rate
metrics.formula: COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN e.completed = TRUE THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 0)
metrics.description: Average completion rate of the course, calculated as the ratio of completed enrollments to total enrollments.

dimensions.name: registration_date
dimensions.description: The date when the user registered.

dimensions.name: enrollment_date
dimensions.description: The date of enrollment, truncated to the day for grouping.

measures.name: total_courses_enrolled
measures.description: Total number of courses that a user is enrolled in.

measures.name: average_course_duration
measures.description: Average duration of courses that a user is enrolled in.

measures.name: total_courses_completed
measures.description: Total number of courses that a user has completed.

measures.name: total_enrollments
measures.description: Total number of enrollments for each course.

measures.name: total_completions
measures.description: Total number of completions for each course.

measures.name: average_completion_time
measures.description: Average time taken to complete the course, excluding zero values.

measures.name: total_courses_enrolled
measures.description: Total number of courses enrolled by the user, handling NULLs.

measures.name: enrollment_days
measures.description: Count of distinct days on which the user enrolled in courses.

measures.name: total_enrollments
measures.description: Total number of enrollments for each course.

measures.name: average_completion_rate
measures.description: Average completion rate of the course, handling NULL and avoiding division by zero.

measures.name: total_duration
measures.description: Total duration of all enrollments for the course, handling NULL values.

measures.name: total_courses_enrolled
measures.description: Total number of courses that a user is enrolled in.

measures.name: average_completion_rate
measures.description: Average completion rate of courses for a user, handling NULL and avoiding division by zero.

measures.name: total_time_spent
measures.description: Total time spent by a user on all enrolled courses, handling NULL values.

measures.name: total_enrollments
measures.description: The total number of enrollments on a given date.

measures.name: total_courses_offered
measures.description: The total number of distinct courses offered on a given date.

measures.name: total_courses_enrolled
measures.description: Total number of courses that each user is enrolled in.

measures.name: avg_course_duration
measures.description: Average duration of courses that each user is enrolled in.

measures.name: total_courses_completed
measures.description: Total number of courses completed by each user.

measures.name: total_enrollments
measures.description: Total number of enrollments for each course.

measures.name: total_courses_enrolled
measures.description: Total number of courses that users have enrolled in.

measures.name: enrollment_days
measures.description: Number of distinct days users have engaged with courses.

measures.name: total_courses_completed
measures.description: Total number of courses that users have completed.
